description: 23.5MHz to 6000MHz Fractional/Integer-N Synthesizer/VCO with integrated VCOs, dual differential outputs, 4-wire SPI interface

pins.name: CLK
pins.description: Serial Clock Input. Data is latched into the 32-bit shift register on the rising edge of CLK.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI clock. Minimum pulse-width high/low 25ns; max clock period 50ns.

pins.name: DATA
pins.description: Serial Data Input. Serial data is loaded MSB first; the 3 LSBs identify the register address.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI MOSI. Data setup time 25ns, hold time 25ns.

pins.name: LE
pins.description: Load Enable Input. When LE goes high, data stored in the shift register is loaded into the appropriate latches.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI CS/LE. Setup time 20ns, hold time 10ns, minimum pulse-width high 20ns.

pins.name: CE
pins.description: Chip Enable. A logic-low powers the part down and the charge pump becomes high impedance.
pins.requirements: Pull high (to VCC_DIG via 10kΩ) for normal operation. Drive low for hardware shutdown.

pins.name: SW
pins.description: Fast-Lock Switch. Connect to the loop filter when using fast-lock mode. No connect in normal mode.
pins.requirements: Normal mode: leave open/no connect. Fast-lock mode: connect to midpoint between R2A and R2B in the loop filter.

pins.name: VCC_CP
pins.description: Power Supply for Charge Pump. Place decoupling capacitors as close as possible to the pin.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0V–3.6V supply. Decouple with 100nF + 10nF capacitors to GND as close as possible to pin.

pins.name: CP_OUT
pins.description: Charge-Pump Output. Connect to external loop filter input.
pins.requirements: Connect to external passive loop filter (R2A/R2B + C1/C2/C3 network), then to TUNE pin.

pins.name: GND_CP
pins.description: Ground for Charge-Pump. Connect to board ground, not to the exposed paddle.
pins.requirements: Connect directly to board ground plane. Do NOT connect to EP paddle directly.

pins.name: GND_PLL
pins.description: Ground for PLL. Connect to main board ground plane, not to the exposed paddle.
pins.requirements: Connect directly to main board ground plane. Do NOT connect to EP paddle directly.

pins.name: VCC_PLL
pins.description: Power Supply for PLL. Place decoupling capacitors as close as possible to the pin.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0V–3.6V supply. Decouple with 100nF + 10nF capacitors to GND as close as possible to pin.

pins.name: GND_RF
pins.description: Ground for RF Outputs. Connect to board ground plane, not to the exposed paddle.
pins.requirements: Connect directly to board RF ground plane. Do NOT connect to EP paddle directly.

pins.name: RFOUTA_P
pins.description: Open Collector Positive RF Output A. Connect to supply through RF choke or 50Ω load.
pins.requirements: Connect to VCC_RF via 27nH RF choke (or 50Ω termination). AC-couple to 50Ω load via 100pF capacitor.

pins.name: RFOUTA_N
pins.description: Open Collector Negative RF Output A. Connect to supply through RF choke or 50Ω load.
pins.requirements: Connect to VCC_RF via 27nH RF choke when used differentially. If single-ended, terminate unused output with 27nH + 50Ω to VCC_RF.

pins.name: RFOUTB_P
pins.description: Open Collector Positive RF Output B. Connect to supply through RF choke or 50Ω load.
pins.requirements: Connect to VCC_RF via 27nH RF choke (or 50Ω termination). AC-couple to 50Ω load via 100pF capacitor.

pins.name: RFOUTB_N
pins.description: Open Collector Negative RF Output B. Connect to supply through RF choke or 50Ω load.
pins.requirements: Connect to VCC_RF via 27nH RF choke when used differentially. If single-ended, terminate unused output with 27nH + 50Ω to VCC_RF.

pins.name: VCC_RF
pins.description: Power Supply for RF Output and Dividers. Place decoupling capacitors as close as possible to the pin.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0V–3.6V supply (dedicated LDO recommended). Decouple with 100nF + 10nF to GND. Also supplies RF output choke bias.

pins.name: VCC_VCO
pins.description: VCO Power Supply. Place decoupling capacitors to the analog ground plane.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0V–3.6V supply. Decouple with 100nF + 10nF capacitors to GND_VCO.

pins.name: GND_VCO
pins.description: Ground for VCO. Connect to main board ground plane, not directly to the paddle.
pins.requirements: Connect to main board analog ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to EP paddle.

pins.name: NOISE_FILT
pins.description: VCO Noise Decoupling. Place a 1µF capacitor to ground.
pins.requirements: Connect a 1µF capacitor directly to GND as close as possible to this pin.

pins.name: TUNE
pins.description: Control Input to the VCO. Connect to output of external loop filter.
pins.requirements: Connect to output node of the passive loop filter (after C3). VCO tune voltage range: 0.5V to 2.5V.

pins.name: GND_TUNE
pins.description: Ground for Control Input to the VCO. Connect to main board ground plane, not directly to the paddle.
pins.requirements: Connect to main board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to EP paddle.

pins.name: RSET
pins.description: Charge-Pump Current Range Input. Connect an external resistor to ground to set the minimum CP current. ICP = 1.63/RSET × (1 + CP[3:0]).
pins.requirements: Connect resistor from this pin to GND. RSET range: 2.7kΩ to 10kΩ. Typical value: 5.1kΩ sets full-scale ICP = 5.12mA.

pins.name: BIAS_FILT
pins.description: VCO Noise Decoupling. Place a 1µF capacitor to ground.
pins.requirements: Connect a 1µF capacitor directly to GND as close as possible to this pin.

pins.name: REG
pins.description: Reference Voltage Compensation. Place a 1µF capacitor to ground.
pins.requirements: Connect a 1µF capacitor directly to GND as close as possible to this pin.

pins.name: LD
pins.description: Lock Detect Output. Logic-high when PLL is locked, logic-low when unlocked. In analog lock detect mode (LD[1:0]=10), this is an open-drain output requiring external pullup.
pins.requirements: Connect to GPIO for lock monitoring. For analog lock detect mode: add 10kΩ pullup to VCC_DIG. Configurable via register 5 bits 23:22.

pins.name: RFOUT_EN
pins.description: RF Output Enable. A logic-low disables all RF outputs.
pins.requirements: Drive high to enable RF outputs, low to mute. Connect to GPIO or pull high via 10kΩ for always-on operation.

pins.name: GND_DIG
pins.description: Ground for Digital circuitry. Connect to main board ground plane, not directly to the paddle.
pins.requirements: Connect to main board digital ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to EP paddle.

pins.name: VCC_DIG
pins.description: Power Supply for Digital Circuitry. Place decoupling capacitors as close as possible to pin.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0V–3.6V supply. Decouple with 100nF + 10nF to GND_DIG as close as possible to pin.

pins.name: REF_IN
pins.description: Reference Frequency Input. High-impedance CMOS inverter input with nominal bias of VCC_DIG/2. AC-couple to reference signal.
pins.requirements: AC-couple reference oscillator (10–200MHz) via series capacitor (e.g. 100nF). Input sensitivity: 0.7 Vpp min. Input capacitance: 2pF.

pins.name: MUX_OUT
pins.description: Multiplexed Output and Serial Data Out. Configurable via MUX bits (register 2 bits 28:26 and register 5 bit 18) to output lock detect, divided reference, N-divider output, or serial readback of register 6.
pins.requirements: Connect to GPIO for status monitoring or leave unconnected if not used. Used as MISO for register 6 readback. Output setup time 10ns, hold time 10ns.

pins.name: GND_SD
pins.description: Ground for Sigma-Delta Modulator. Connect to main board ground plane, not directly to the paddle.
pins.requirements: Connect to main board ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to EP paddle.

pins.name: VCC_SD
pins.description: Power Supply for Sigma-Delta Modulator. Place decoupling capacitors as close as possible to the pin.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0V–3.6V supply. Decouple with 100nF + 10nF to GND as close as possible to pin.

pins.name: EP
pins.description: Exposed Pad (thermal/ground pad on package bottom). Must be connected to board ground.
pins.requirements: Solder to board ground plane via thermal vias. Primary heat-dissipation path and signal ground reference for the IC.

example_application.description: Wideband PLL frequency synthesizer: MAX2870 driven by external TCXO/OCXO reference (10–200MHz) AC-coupled to REF_IN. Passive loop filter (R2A, R2B, C1, C2, C3) connects CP_OUT to TUNE pin. Dual differential open-collector RF outputs (RFOUTA± and RFOUTB±) each biased via 27nH RF choke to VCC_RF, AC-coupled to 50Ω loads. SPI interface (CLK, DATA, LE) driven by MCU or FPGA. Three separate LDOs supply VCC_RF, VCC_DIG, and VCC_PLL for best isolation. RFOUT_EN and CE controlled via GPIO.
required_passives: 100nF + 10nF decoupling capacitors on each VCC_ pin (VCC_CP, VCC_PLL, VCC_RF, VCC_VCO, VCC_DIG, VCC_SD)
Loop filter: R2A (30Ω), R2B (90Ω), C1 (12nF), C2 (100nF), C3 (820pF) — typical values for 40kHz loop BW at 25MHz PFD
27nH RF choke from each RF output pin (RFOUTA_P, RFOUTA_N, RFOUTB_P, RFOUTB_N) to VCC_RF
100pF AC-coupling capacitor on each used RF output to 50Ω load
10kΩ pullup on LD (optional; required for analog lock detect mode)
example_application.typical_schematic_notes: Use star power-supply routing with large bypass capacitor at central VCC node; branch to each VCC_ pin with its own local bypass cap. Connect all separate GND_ pins (GND_CP, GND_PLL, GND_RF, GND_VCO, GND_TUNE, GND_DIG, GND_SD) to main board ground plane — NOT directly to the exposed paddle. Solder EP to ground plane via thermal vias. Program registers in order 5→4→3→2→1→0, then repeat with 20ms pause between the two full sequences after power-up. For fast-lock: segment shunt resistor into R2A (1/4 of total) and R2B (3/4 of total), connect SW between them.
